title: Accelerated Brush
body:
This mod allows to configure the speed of suspicious block brushing, reducing the tedium of archeology mechanic.

To do this, modify `tickAmount` value in mod's config. By default, it makes brushing 2.5x faster (from 5 seconds to 2 seconds).

Compared to [existing 1.20.1 Fash Brush mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-brush), this mod changes brushing's animation speed instead of reducing amount of brushing, resulting in better visuals.
